description: The Java Technical Lead is responsible for designing, developing, and leading enterprise grade Java applications, ensuring scalability, security, and high performance while mentoring development teams.
responsibilities: Lead architecture and design of Java-based applications
Guide teams on Spring, Spring Boot, and microservices architecture
Review code and enforce Java coding standards and best practices
Collaborate with product, QA, DevOps, and architecture teams

skills.name: Core Java, Java 8+, Spring Boot, Hibernate/JPA
